notes: READ-ONLY audit. ADD/REMOVE are flags for manual action only; no DB entry was added/removed/edited. Trust superset uses PrimaryRoleId RO197+RO57+RO107 (RO107 added beyond the prompt's RO197/RO57 because 3 live foundation trusts — Bradford District Care TAD, Sheffield Health & Social Care TAH, Black Country Healthcare TAJ — have RO107 as their primary role and would otherwise be false REMOVE flags). ICB superset uses non-primary Roles=RO318 (PrimaryRoleId=RO318 returns nothing). Death determined by Date[Legal].End<=today, never Status. 54 ORD-Active orgs were excluded as already-dead (Legal End passed) — e.g. predecessor trusts/ICBs kept Active post-merger. All 3 ADD candidates are Welsh NHS trusts (out of scope for an England trust/ICB dataset). Change feed since 2026-05-29 returned 846 changed orgs; only K0N6A is in the DB and remains live.
